languages.text: "Не лги мне, техножрица. Я же вижу: вы ломаете центральную буровую установку станции".
"Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill complex."
languages.original_text: "Не лги мне, техножрица. Я же вижу: вы ломаете центральную буровую установку станции".

traits.locale_text: "Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill complex."
"Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill complex."
"Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill rig."
"Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill complex."
"Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill complex."

languages.text: 「それは嘘、テクプリスト。私は自分の目で見ている。あなたが駅の中央のドリル台を破壊している」
languages.original_text: "Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill rig."

traits.locale_text: 「嘘は言わないでください、テクプリスト。私は自分の目で見ています。あなたが駅の中央のドリル台を破壊しているのです。」

languages.text: «No me mienta, tecnosacerdotisa. Tengo ojos para ver. Está rompiendo el complejo central de perforación de la estación».
languages.original_text: "Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill complex."

traits.locale_text: «No me mienta, tecnosacerdotisa. Tengo ojos para ver. Está rompiendo el complejo central de perforación de la estación».

languages.text: “别撒谎，技术神甫。我亲眼看见你在破坏星站的中央钻探中枢。”
languages.original_text: "Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill complex."

traits.locale_text: “别撒谎，技术神甫。我亲眼看见你在破坏星站的中央钻探中枢。”

languages.text: "Lügt mich nicht an, Techpriesterin. Ich kann es selbst sehen: Ihr zerstört den zentralen Bohrkomplex der Station."
languages.original_text: "Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill complex."

traits.locale_text: "Lügt mich nicht an, Techpriesterin. Ich kann es selbst sehen: Ihr zerstört den zentralen Bohrkomplex der Station."

languages.text: "Bana yalan söyleme Tekno Rahip. Kendi gözlerimle görüyorum: İstasyonun merkezî sondaj kompleksini bozuyorsun."
languages.original_text: "Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill complex."

traits.locale_text: "Bana yalan söyleme Tekno Rahip. Kendi gözlerimle görüyorum: İstasyonun merkezî sondaj kompleksini bozuyorsun."

languages.text: « Ne me mentez pas, technoprêtresse. Je le vois de mes propres yeux : vous êtes en train de détruire le complexe central de la station. »
languages.original_text: "Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill complex."

traits.locale_text: « Ne me mentez pas, technoprêtresse. Je le vois de mes propres yeux : vous êtes en train de détruire le complexe central de la station. »
